## ЁЯЫая╕П Resolved Bugs in Current Audit Cycle

### 1. [FIXED] `about:blank` Bug on Image Thumbnail Click (`TC-PHOTO-01`)
* **Symptom:** When clicking on report photo thumbnails in the Admin Console (`AdminConsole.tsx`), browsers opened a blank page with URL `about:blank`.
* **Root Cause:** When images were uploaded or captured as Base64 Data URLs (`data:image/jpeg;base64,...`), clicking `<a href={img} target="_blank">` triggered modern browser security mechanisms that block top-level tab navigation to `data:` URLs to prevent anti-phishing/XSS vectors.
* **Resolution:** Created a responsive, glassmorphism **`ImageLightboxModal`** component (`src/components/ImageLightboxModal.tsx`). Replaced raw `<a target="_blank">` links across `AdminConsole`, `ResponderDashboard`, `TrackingPortal`, and `InteractiveMap` with interactive zoom buttons that display the full image safely inside an in-app lightbox overlay.

### 2. [FIXED] Vite Chunk & Dynamic Import Conflicts (`TC-BUILD-01`)
* **Symptom:** Production bundler generated warnings regarding duplicated static and dynamic imports for `firebase/app` and `firebase/firestore`.
* **Root Cause:** Mixed usage of `await import("./utils/firebase")` alongside top-level static imports in `App.tsx` and `userTracker.ts`.
* **Resolution:** Refactored imports to unified static imports, eliminating bundle conflicts and speeding up execution.
